pageSubtitle: Configure default map view, layer visibility, and interface preferences. Settings are automatically saved to local browser.

sections.zoomDesc: Set the default zoom level when the map page loads (1-10)
sections.layersDesc: Choose which layers are visible when the map loads
sections.resetDesc: Restore all settings to their default values
sections.cacheDesc: localStorage caches data with 24-hour auto-expiry. Cache hits skip re-parsing.
sections.performanceDesc: Monitor page load and key operation execution times using the Performance API.
sections.dataQualityDesc: Real-time monitoring of data integrity, consistency, and timeliness to ensure reliable data sources.
